subcodes.first_line: O Hand of God! The Jews have said: "The Hand of God is fettered." Say: Nay, by His very Self! He doeth whatsoever He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یدالله قالت الیهود ید الله مغلوله قل لا و نفسه الحق انه یفعل ما یشاء و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
